title: KableRika LED Desk Lamp for Office, Double Head Desk Lamp with Base, Dimmable Architect Desk Light, Eye Caring Monitor Light Bar with Timer, Task Lamp for Work Study Read Home Office Lighting
features: 🌟【Stable Metal Base & Highly Flexible Gooseneck】Sturdy base allows it to be used in more scenes, will not tip over easily when moving, perfectly match your need (Fits nicely in any desk, workbench, sewing table). Durable silicone gooseneck supports adjustable working height 42cm-68cm to satisfy your different needs in heights or angles.

🌟【Double Head Desk Lamp, Great For Multi-Task】The desk lamp for home office has two lamp bars which can be fully extended up to 68cm and provides enough lighting for large workstation, ideal for wide curved monitors, dual monitors or L-shaped desk. Folding the lamp bars together as side lamp will help you focus more on the particular work/task area.

🌟【No Messy Cables & Easy To Touch Front-Buttons】KableRika 24V 12W double head desk lamp with base has minimalist all-in-black design with hidden cables, which is a stylish addition to workspace. Also featuring sensitive front-touch control panel, it makes the buttons visible and easy to operate when sitting at the monitor, perfect for working, reading, studying etc.

🌟【16 Combined Lighting Modes & 30Mins Timer Function】The led desk lamp offers smooth switching of 4 color temperatures(3000K-6000K) and 4 brightness levels(25%-100%), enable you to customize your desired combined modes. Long press the power button until the lamp flash once to activate the 30mins auto-off timer function.(Cancel by long pressing until flash twice)

🌟【Energy Saving & Comfortable Lighting】The eye care desk lamp provides evenly soft diffused lighting without glare or flicker, CRI＞90, protecting your eyes from fatigue. Equipped with high quality lamp beads, it consumes 85% less energy than traditional incandescent lights. Please feel free to contact customer service with any questions or concerns.

How to Assemble ? Take off the cap from pole end then pull out the wire Place the wire at notch and snap back the cap Attach the lamp bar to gooseneck Fix the lamp pole to base with 4 screws The video showcases the product in use. Maximum Working Height The desk lamp supports working height 42cm(min)-68cm(max), great for WFH, large workstation or dual monitors. Visible Front-Touch Panel The touch controls are visible when in use on a computer desk or you are sitting at the monitor, just need a light tap then function performs well. Highly Flexible Gooseneck Equipped with 360° bendable gooseneck, satisfy your different needs in heights or angles. Stable Metal Base Sturdy base allows it to be used in more scenes, perfectly match your need (Fits nicely in any desk, workbench, sewing table). Multi-Task Desk Lamp For Home Office Wide Adjustable Double Lamp Bar The two lamp heads can be adjusted by 90° each, which can be fully extended up to 68cm and then provides enough lighting for large area. With adjustable double lamp bars and 62.5cm maximum working height, the tall desk lamp can perfectly match large monitors, dual monitors or curved screens. Focus More On Particular Areas Keep the lamp bars folded together is a good way to focus the light on the particular work/task area, which helps you complete the job more efficiently. The long gooseneck also has great range of motion and can direct the light where you need it, Ideal for more scenes.
